---
title: "Option D — Conflicts of Interest vs Evidence Dissemination"
author: ""
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
---

## Introduction

## Data Sources

- **ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API**: trial IDs, dates, results status, investigator names
- **CMS Open Payments**: payment amounts, company names, recipient NPI/profile IDs
- **PubMed (NCBI E-utilities)**: PMIDs linked to NCT identifiers
- **OpenAlex** (optional): citation and venue metadata

## Methods

### Data Acquisition

### Record Linkage Pipeline (Trials → Investigators → Payments → Publications)

## EDA

### Payment Distributions by Specialty and Company

### Results Posting and Publication Share

### Linkage QA: Match-Confidence Strata

## Preliminary Modeling

## Limitations

## Conclusion and Final-Project Plan
